approvalSource: Steve said go after the final Phase 1 enforcement plan revision defined protected Foundation paths and process:foundation-ship per-card gate behavior.
notes: Approval covers the Phase 1 enforcement bundle only: approval-integrity v2 bootstrap, build-log backlog-ID ownership cleanup, bounded closeout backfill for the 13 snapshotted cards, and repo-managed Git hook installation. No Phase G Track 2, UI polish, Strategy, Scoper, Agent Factory, or corpus expansion is approved.
